title: Silas' Plushy Pack
description: A plushy pack designated for TTRP :D Requires the Variants-CIT mod!
body:
Heya! I'm ArchiviztSilas, or just Silas for short, and I made this plushy pack! I play on a server called **Tall Tales Roleplay**, and I enjoy making plushies of other peoples characters! Hope you all enjoy this pack :D

I made this pack that includes _retextured models/items_ to look like plushies of some peoples skins! They can be put in many places: **In your room**, **As a comfort item while mining**, And more! 

**You can receive these plushies by talking to Ebony the Innkeeper of the Underground Inn on TTRP!**
